data.title: AI Expectations Rise in Logistics, but Scaled Adoption Remains Limited
data.description: A recent report by BCG, derived from a survey conducted in collaboration with Alpega involving over 180 logistics providers and shippers, indicates a significant trend in the industry. Findings show that over 40% of shippers are considering AI capabilities when selecting logistics providers. Additionally, approximately 40% of logistics service providers have advanced beyond pilot stages in implementing AI technologies. However, only around 10% have fully integrated AI capabilities into their operations.

data.title: US lawmakers unveil crypto tax proposal excluding Bitcoin exemption; suggests stablecoins gain/loss exemption if pegged to fiat.
data.description: The proposed bill suggests that dollar-pegged stablecoins would not incur gains or losses if they closely track the value of the fiat currency they are pegged to. This exemption would apply to stablecoins that maintain a strong peg to the underlying currency.

data.title: CircumcisionLA.com Expands Circumcision and Men's Health Services in Los Angeles
data.description: In Los Angeles, CircumcisionLA.com, overseen by board-certified physician Dr. Padra Gad Nourparvar, now offers circumcision services for adults, teenagers, and children. The clinic has broadened its scope to provide evaluation and treatment for various men's health and urological issues.

data.title: Turning Potential into Reality: Future 500 Ignites Scale-Up Momentum in Europe
data.description: On March 27, 2026, in Brussels, the Future 500 - Champions of Growth conference convened, uniting policymakers, investors, entrepreneurs, and scientists to tackle a critical issue in Europe. The event focused on strategies to scale companies and enhance competitiveness in the region. This gathering saw a significant attendance of individuals from various sectors and backgrounds, highlighting the importance of collaboration in driving growth and innovation.

data.title: AGCO Honors America's Farmers at the "Great American Agriculture Celebration" in Washington, D.C.
data.description: The renowned Fendt® golden tractor was prominently displayed at a special event at the White House, honoring farmers worldwide. On March 27, 2026, key figures from AGCO (NYSE: AGCO) attended the gathering alongside President Donald Trump, farmers, industry leaders, and policymakers. This event highlighted the critical role of farmers in feeding the global population.

data.title: Corgi Insurance Acquires Corgi.com to Accelerate Its AI-Powered Insurance Platform
data.description: In San Francisco on March 27, 2026, Corgi Insurance revealed the acquisition of Corgi.com, obtaining the valuable domain in their pursuit of establishing a cutting-edge, AI-driven insurance provider. This move marks a major step for the company as they aim to create a seamless digital experience for customers. The acquisition is a strategic investment to bolster their technological capabilities and strengthen their position in the insurance industry.

data.title: "Anthropic's new AI model, Claude Mythos, poses major cybersecurity threat as it leaks, raising concerns."
data.description: Anthropic's latest AI model, named Claude Mythos, is being hailed as a significant advancement in AI technology. Experts believe that this new model represents a major leap forward in the field. However, concerns have been raised about the potential impact of this technological development on cybersecurity measures.

data.title: BitGo Holdings Analysts Cut Their Forecasts After Q4 Results
data.description: BitGo Holdings Inc (NYSE: BTGO) released positive fourth-quarter results, exceeding analyst expectations. The company reported quarterly losses of $1.03 per share, surpassing the estimated losses of $1.29 per share. Additionally, BitGo posted quarterly sales of $6.157 billion, outperforming the anticipated $6.093 billion in sales. CEO Mike Belshe stated that in January, BitGo achieved the status of being the first public, federally chartered digital asset infrastructure company. These achievements, along with the strong performance in Q4 and full-year 2025 results, mark significant progress for BitGo.
